Package microui.layout

Class ColumnLayoutParams

java.lang.Object
microui.layout.LinearAxisLayoutParams
microui.layout.ColumnLayoutParams
All Implemented Interfaces:
LayoutParams
public final class ColumnLayoutParams extends LinearAxisLayoutParams
Layout parameters specifically for ColumnLayout, defining how components are positioned and sized within a vertical column arrangement.

ColumnLayoutParams extends LinearAxisLayoutParams to provide weight-based vertical sizing and horizontal alignment control for components in a ColumnLayout. The weight parameter determines the proportional vertical space allocation, while alignX controls horizontal alignment within the column.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ColumnLayoutParams

      public ColumnLayoutParams(float weight, int alignX)
      Constructs ColumnLayoutParams with specified weight and horizontal alignment.
      Parameters:
      weight - the weight factor for vertical space allocation (determines height proportion)
      alignX - the horizontal alignment within the column (typically 0=left, 1=center, 2=right)

    • ColumnLayoutParams

      public ColumnLayoutParams(float weight)
      Constructs ColumnLayoutParams with specified weight and default left alignment.
      Parameters:
      weight - the weight factor for vertical space allocation

  • Method Details

    • getAlignX

      public int getAlignX()
      Returns the horizontal alignment value. Overrides parent method to provide type-correct return value.
      Returns:
      the horizontal alignment value
